rationale: The provider message map's user/assistant converters renamed Bp5/pp5 (2.1.143) to hLz/SLz (2.1.156) and the host expression changed from a local binding (let D=H.map(...)) to a comma-sequence return after the tengu_api_cache_breakpoints telemetry call (return d("tengu_api_cache_breakpoints",{...}),H.map(...)). The selector was re-derived to match the seam structurally (cache-breakpoint telemetry, user/api_system/else converter branches, two distinct converters) and the messageVar extractor extended for the comma-sequence shape; minScore 30 / minMargin 10 unchanged; unique candidate at score 105. Behavioral 2.1.156 regression tests added.

The attachment-pipeline selector resolves uniquely against the frozen 2.1.156 bundle (function bW4(H,$) with hook_permission_decision dedup, score 50, 13 candidates) with no selector change; minScore 15 / minMargin 10 unchanged.

The reminder-render switch selector resolves uniquely against the frozen 2.1.156 bundle (file/todo_reminder switch, score 40, 1 candidate) with no selector change; minScore 15 / minMargin 10 unchanged.

The token-usage helper selector resolves uniquely against the frozen 2.1.156 bundle (function Wu5 usage accumulator with contextWindow/maxOutputTokens, score 47, 9 candidates) with no selector change; minScore 15 / minMargin 10 unchanged.

In 2.1.156 the greedy converter regex spilled the content-sanitizer helper I69(H) match across the function boundary into the assistant converter, tying it with the real user converter hLz at exactly minMargin (90 vs 80) so selection fail-closed with AnchorAmbiguousError. A scorer signal for the provider-converter 4-arg signature (P1,P2=!1 was added (+20), distinguishing the real converter (hLz, score 110) from the single-arg sanitizer (I69, 80) by margin 30; minScore 35 / minMargin 10 unchanged. Selected user converter hLz at offset 13107940.
findRuntimeHelpers resolves the config-dir getter uniquely against the frozen 2.1.156 bundle (l8, honoring CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR, 6 history.jsonl/projects/todos join call sites) with no discovery change.

findRuntimeHelpers resolves the fs getter uniquely against the frozen 2.1.156 bundle (U$, function U$(){return XI9}, repeated existsSync/readFileSync/writeFileSync call sites) with no discovery change.

findRuntimeHelpers resolves the session-id getter uniquely against the frozen 2.1.156 bundle (E$, function E$(){return nk()?.sessionId??d$.sessionId}, the optional-current-session shape) with no discovery change.
